headline: Assessing Deere’s (DE) Valuation After A Strong Three-Year Run And Mixed Recent Share Moves
summary: How Deere’s recent performance frames the stock today Deere (DE) has climbed 26.2% year to date, with a 19.7% total return over the past year. The stock is down 2.6% over the past month and 3.8% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Deere. At a share price of $589.19, Deere’s recent 1-week share price gain contrasts with its 1-month and 3-month share price declines. The 3-year total shareholder return of 69.4% shows how much earlier investors have been rewarded overall. If Deere’s...

headline: John Deere Tests Brand Reach With Every Man Jack Walmart Grooming Line
summary: John Deere (NYSE:DE) has launched a first of its kind lifestyle collaboration with grooming brand Every Man Jack. The limited edition grooming product line is being released at Walmart stores and on Walmart channels. The partnership extends Deere's presence from agricultural and construction equipment into consumer lifestyle and personal care. For a company best known for tractors and heavy machinery, NYSE:DE stepping into grooming products indicates that its brand resonates beyond farm...
